{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201713580643159D3A0D92B375EF"}"},"total":2},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7425160067667755800","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一本很特别的小说，在古代和现代之间来回切换，两个主人公，分别是现代人和古代人，同时互相穿越，在不同的时空中独立发展剧情。而串起小说的背景，则是琳琅满目和独出心裁的美食，现代江湖菜与古代宫廷菜的激情碰撞，使故事活色生香，悬念迭出，引人入胜。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728807834,"group_id":"7424498567403818009","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你的关注，我必不负。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8yT44TY95QPpKbQRtwbyHM=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/35f342c187ba4926816b5771696200cf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532615&x-signature=hz2SSpMxfJMXHg8X%2FUldtSjK16A%3D","user_id":"22450823938","user_name":"河是一匹马"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"22450823938","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7424498567403818009","book_info":{"abstract":"一体双灵魂的故事，两具身体，身处不同的时期，一个在现代，一个在古代，现代人附身于古代人体内，古代人附身于现代人体内，在不同的背景下，展开各自不同的故事。
现代人叫於仲青，高中学生，一觉醒来，发现体内多出一个灵魂，这个灵魂叫顾韬晦，来自于一千多年前的大昭国，是皇宫的御膳官。两个人从惊吓、不解到无奈接受、和平共处，最后一起升级打怪，驰骋江湖。现代人於仲青最终开创了一个美食帝国，两个人都在这场拼搏中成长起来。
古代人叫顾韬晦，被树上掉下来的果子砸中胸口，发现有灵魂钻进了自己体内，双方互相提防，戒备，到相互融合，补充，在宫廷对嫡大战中愈挫愈勇，最后在错综复杂的宫斗中战胜幕后黑手，正义最后战胜邪恶，而两个灵魂也得到升华。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oed1cd05fc8f4e655ecc7b40cabc5f52e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"河是一匹马","author_id":"","book_id":"7424498567403818009","book_name":"江湖宫廷菜","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7424499291143553561","read_count":"6","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1063069"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"272","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,美食,发家致富,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oed1cd05fc8f4e655ecc7b40cabc5f52e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182038&x-signature=akfHp4PaJNLPokoHFPWM4q2aikE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"22450823938","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201713580643159D3A0D92B375EF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score 身于现代人体内，在不同的背景下，展开各自不同的故事。
现代人叫於仲青，高中学生，一觉醒来，发现体内多出一个灵魂，这个灵魂叫顾韬晦，来自于一千多年前的大昭国，是皇宫的御膳官。两个人从惊吓、不解到无奈接受、和平共处，最后一起升级打怪，驰骋江湖。现代人於仲青最终开创了一个美食帝国，两个人都在这场拼搏中成长起来。
古代人叫顾韬晦，被树上掉下来的果子砸中胸口，发现有灵魂钻进了自己体内，双方互相提防，戒备，到相互融合，补充，在宫廷对嫡大战中愈挫愈勇，最后在错综复杂的宫斗中战胜幕后黑手，正义最后战胜邪恶，而两个灵魂也得到升华。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oed1cd05fc8f4e655ecc7b40cabc5f52e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"河是一匹马","author_id":"","book_id":"7424498567403818009","book_name":"江湖宫廷菜","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7424499291143553561","read_count":"6","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1063069"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"272","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,美食,发家致富,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oed1cd05fc8f4e655ecc7b40cabc5f52e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182038&x-signature=akfHp4PaJNLPokoHFPWM4q2aikE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"22450823938","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"11"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201713580643159D3A0D92B375EF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score
